name: CNH Industrial N.V.
business: CNH Industrial N.V. is a leading global equipment company that develops, manufactures and sells agricultural and construction equipment. Its Financial Services segment offers retail financing for end customers and wholesale financing to dealers. The company sells through a global network of independent dealers.

exposures.sentence: The Agriculture segment develops, manufactures, distributes and supports a full line of agriculture equipment, implements and precision agriculture solutions.

The Construction segment develops, manufactures, distributes and supports a full line of construction equipment including excavators, crawler dozers, graders, wheel loaders, backhoe loaders, skid steer loaders, and compact track loaders.
We began production and distribution of full-electric compact construction equipment in 2023.
In 2023, we acquired Augmenta Holding SAS ("Augmenta"), a machine vision company that automates and optimizes farming operations using real-time, multi-spectral sensors and agronomic insights.
internalizing foundational technologies, launching new precision solutions, and leveraging artificial intelligence tools.
Raven is a global technology brand primarily focused on developing disruptive agricultural technologies that seek to solve in-field challenges and provide automated and autonomous farming solutions.
CNH has developed a methane-powered tractor under its New Holland brand that can also run on methane produced on the farm from animal and food waste.
In 2023, we acquired Hemisphere GNSS ("Hemisphere"), enabling us to design, manufacture, sell, and service precise GNSS solutions for agriculture and construction.

We are committed to driving sustainable organic growth by strategically investing in initiatives that expand our market leadership, advance technology integration through our "Iron + Tech" strategy, with a focus on precision agriculture, automation, connectivity, and autonomy.
